actions.name: Generate Code
actions.description: Autonomously generate code for a task with full agentic loop — reads context, writes implementation, verifies

actions.name: Refactor
actions.description: Refactor existing code — extract functions, rename symbols, restructure modules, improve readability

actions.name: Write Tests
actions.description: Write unit and integration tests for a given module or function. Covers happy paths, edge cases, and error scenarios.

actions.name: Explain Code
actions.description: Explain what code does — summarize logic, document purpose, describe data flow

actions.name: Review PR
actions.description: Review a pull request diff — surface bugs, logic errors, security issues, and improvement suggestions

actions.name: Pack Shard
actions.description: Pack codex agent output into a SCXQDDS training shard and register in shard-manifest.json
